Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

STT 2, 245 [Dream rituals][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[EN₂ kir]-ba!(IS-)an!(BAR) kir-ba-an

(o 1) [Incantation:] O clod, O clod! [In] the lump that is pinched off from you (is a bit of) myself; [in] the lump that is pinched off from me (is a bit of) yourself.

o 22

[ina] ⸢ker⸣-ṣi-ka ga-ri-iṣ NI₂u₂-ia

o 33

[ina ker]-⸢ṣi⸣-ia ga-ri-iṣ NI₂u₂-ka

o 44

[LAG] lu-mun MAŠ₂.GE₆

(o 4) [O clod!] The evil of the dream that I see (and) that I repeatedly saw (during) the evening watch, the middle watch (and) the dawn watch -

o 55

[EN].⸢NUN.AN.USAN₂⸣ EN.NUN.MURU₂.[BA]

o 66

[EN].NUN.U₄.ZAL.⸢LA⸣ am-mar a-tam-⸢ma⸣-[ru]

o 77

[a-bi me-e]-ti a-⸢mu-ru⸣ um-mi me-e-ti a-⸢mu⸣-[ru]

(o 7) (in) which I saw [my] dead [father] (or) I saw my dead mother (or) [...] ... [...] (or) I saw a prince (or) [...] (or) I saw unknown learning (or) I went [...] ... (or) I repeatedly ate [...] (or) I had put on [...] -

o 88

[...] x [...] NUN a-mu-⸢ru⸣

o 99

[... NIG₂].⸢ZU⸣ la₃ ⸢ZU⸣u₂ a-mu-ru

o 1010

[...] x ⸢al⸣-li-ku

o 1111

[... a-tak]-ka!-lu!(KU)

o 1212

[...] ⸢al-lab-šu₂⸣

o 1313

[...] ana A-MEŠ a-⸢nam-du⸣

(o 13) [...] I throw [...] into the water, [...], you will dissolve, you will [not] return [...].

o 1414

[... tap]-⸢pa-ṭa⸣-ru

o 1515

[... NU GUR]ar₂

o 1616

[... a]-⸢mu⸣-ru

(o 16) May [...] that I saw, be thrown [...].

o 1717

[... li-in]-⸢na⸣-di

o 1818

[...] ⸢lip-pa⸣-ṭir

(o 18) [...]; may it be dissolved.

(rest of obverse missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[... li-qad-di-ša₂]-⸢an⸣-[ni]

(r 1') [May ... purify] me; [may ... receive from] me; [...]; may it take away [...].

r 2'2'

[... lim-ḫur-an]-ni

r 3'3'

[...] lit-⸢bal⸣

r 4'4'

[... a-mu]-⸢ru⸣ lu SIG₅⸢at⸣

(r 4') [...] that I saw - may it be good!

r 5'5'

[...] ⸢IGI⸣ lu ki-na-at

(r 5') [...] that I saw - may it be true!

r 6'6'

[... a-na] ⸢SIG₅⸣ti tir-ra

(r 6') [...] turn it into good fortune!

r 7'7'

[DU₃.DU₃-BI lu ana] ⸢LAG MUN⸣ lu ana LAG IM

(r 7') [Its ritual:] you recite [the incantation] 3 times [either over] a lump of salt or over a lump of clay. You throw it [into the water. The evil] of the dream will not approach the man.

r 8'8'

[EN₂] 3-šu₂ ŠIDnu

r 9'9'

[ana A]-MEŠ ŠUBdi

r 10'10'

[lu-mun MAŠ₂].⸢GE₆⸣ ana LU₂ NU TEa

r 11'11'

[...] x NI

(r 11') [...] ....

(rest of reverse blank)
